title: Feed
description: A data publication providing transit or mobility information in a standardised format for consumption by applications or planners.

feedType.description: Format of the feed (e.g. GTFS, GTFS_RT, GBFS, NeTEx)

feedPublisher.description: Name of the organisation publishing this feed

feedLanguage.description: BCP-47 language code for the feed content

feedStartDate.description: Date from which the feed data is valid

feedEndDate.description: Date until which the feed data is valid
